## Purpose

This directory contains GitHub Actions workflows.

## Responsibilities

- Define repository quality gates.
- Provide automation entry points for maintainers.
- Keep CI behavior transparent to contributors.

## Future Contents

- Markdown linting.
- Formatting checks.
- Spell checking.
- Link checking.
- License checking.
- Tests once implementation exists.

## Relationship to Other Directories

Workflows run checks against repository content and future tools, tests, docs, CLI, website, engines, and modules.
